name: website-audit
description: Audit a website for messaging, UX, SEO basics, performance signals, and conversion issues.
instructions: Open the target website, inspect key pages, extract visible messaging, navigation, calls to action, content structure, and obvious technical issues. Return prioritized findings with evidence, severity, and concrete fixes.

examples.output: A prioritized audit with UX, messaging, and SEO recommendations.

author: Neura
